TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vahu, title = Vahu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vahu} }

S.FORM: alang Vahu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 38 buwan, 102 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 101 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 7%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Vahu hya' ga Samuluh. tay 'zil na Vahu hya' ga Bulbul. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Vahu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Vahu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 38 buwan, 102 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 101 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 7%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Vahu hya' ga Samuluh. tay 'zil na Vahu hya' ga Bulbul. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Vahu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *aħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *aħu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕamuluħ. taj ʔzil na *aħu ħjaʔ ɣa βulβul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *aħu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
